answer: A halal mortgage is home financing without interest, based on Islamic finance principles. With DAR Hypotheken, you and DAR become co-owners of the property. You gradually buy out DAR's share through monthly payments consisting of repayment and a usage fee — no interest. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

DAR Hypotheken is the first halal mortgage provider in the Netherlands. We offer an interest-free alternative to traditional mortgages, based on the principle of co-ownership. DAR operates under the supervision of the Dutch Financial Markets Authority (AFM) and our product is certified by Noor Shariah Solutions. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

With the DAR Mortgage, you and DAR become joint owners of the property. You gradually buy out DAR's share through monthly repayments. As you repay more, your ownership share grows. After full repayment, you are the sole owner — this is called Diminishing Musharakah. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

what does it cost per month
answer: Your monthly payment with DAR consists of two parts: the repayment (buying out DAR's ownership share) and a usage fee (for using the part still owned by DAR). Payments are fixed and predictable, comparable to a traditional mortgage. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

Yes, the DAR Mortgage is fully Sharia-compliant. Our product has been reviewed and certified by Noor Shariah Solutions, an independent and internationally recognized Sharia advisory firm. DAR is continuously monitored to ensure compliance with all Islamic finance principles. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

answer: The DAR Mortgage is for everyone, regardless of religion or background. While our product is designed according to Islamic principles, it is an excellent alternative for anyone seeking transparent home financing without interest. First-time buyers, movers, and those refinancing are all welcome. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

The key difference is that DAR does not charge interest. Instead of a loan with interest, you and DAR become co-owners of the property. You pay a usage fee for DAR's share — not interest. Legally and financially, this is a fundamentally different construct from a traditional mortgage. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

The standard term of the DAR Mortgage is 30 years. During this period, you gradually purchase full ownership of the property. It is also possible to repay earlier without penalties or additional costs. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

Yes, with DAR you can repay early without penalties or extra costs. If your financial situation allows, you can buy out DAR's share faster. After full repayment, you are the sole owner of the property. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

patterns: what if i want to move
answer: If you want to move, you can sell the property. The proceeds are divided based on ownership shares: your share and DAR's share. You can then take out a new DAR Mortgage for your next property. Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656 to discuss your options.

How much you can finance depends on your income, the property value, and other factors. The acceptance criteria are comparable to those of other mortgage providers. Request a free introductory consultation to discuss your personal options. Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

The requirements are comparable to those of other mortgage providers in the Netherlands. Your income, the property value, and your financial situation are assessed. Both individuals and couples can apply. Want to know more about your personal situation? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

You can start with a free introductory consultation through our website or by phone. This is followed by a personal advisory meeting, the mortgage application, and upon approval, completion at the notary. The process is comparable to a regular mortgage application. Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.
DAR Hypotheken is located at Oostenburgermiddenstraat 119, 1018 LH Amsterdam. You can reach us by email at info@darhypotheken.nl or by phone at 020-210 1656. We are happy to help!

patterns: what kind of company is dar
answer: DAR Hypotheken is not a bank but a mortgage provider specializing in halal home financing. We operate under the supervision of the Dutch Financial Markets Authority (AFM) and are registered with the Chamber of Commerce. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

With the DAR Mortgage, you and DAR are co-owners. If the property value increases, you benefit proportionally to your ownership share. Monthly payments remain unchanged during the fixed period, regardless of value fluctuations. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.
Want to know more about renovation options with a DAR Mortgage? Please contact our advisors. They can inform you about the available options. Reach us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

Instead of interest, with DAR you pay a usage fee for the part of the property still owned by DAR. This is not interest but a fee for using property that DAR co-owns. The fee decreases as you repay more and DAR's share becomes smaller. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

The total costs of a DAR Mortgage are market-based and comparable to what is common on the Dutch mortgage market. The usage fee is based on a percentage comparable to market interest rates. So you do not necessarily pay more than with a traditional mortgage. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

The usage fee with DAR Hypotheken is tax-deductible under certain conditions, similar to mortgage interest deduction with a traditional mortgage. For the exact tax implications of your situation, we recommend consulting a tax advisor. Feel free to contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

After full repayment — after 30 years or earlier with accelerated repayment — you are the sole and complete owner of the property. No further payments to DAR are required. The property is completely yours. Want to know more? Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

For information about National Mortgage Guarantee (NHG) options with a DAR Mortgage, we recommend contacting our advisors. They can inform you about the current possibilities. Reach us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656.

The DAR Mortgage is available for both existing properties and new builds. Whether you want to buy an existing home or a new construction project, we can help. Contact us at info@darhypotheken.nl or 020-210 1656 to discuss your options.
